suite.name: Open-Library-Dom

kw.name: Route Api
kw.doc: Intercept requests matching *url_pattern* and return mock data.

kw.name: Open Capture
kw.doc: Open a browser and navigate to *url*.

kw.name: Wait For Selector
kw.doc: Wait until *selector* is in the given *state* (default ``visible``).

kw.name: Capture Step
kw.doc: Capture the current page state as a demo step.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Fill a form field identified by *selector*.

kw.name: Capture Step
kw.doc: Capture the current page state as a demo step.

kw.name: Wait For Selector
kw.doc: Wait until *selector* is in the given *state* (default ``visible``).

kw.name: Capture Step
kw.msg: [capture] Step 2: 'Results appear from the demo’s mock data — no real API request was made' (dom mode)
kw.arg: caption=Results appear from the demo\u2019s mock data \u2014 no real API request was made
kw.doc: Capture the current page state as a demo step.

kw.name: Export Demo
kw.msg: [capture] Wrote wireframe: /Users/kconroy/repos/docs-wireframe-demo/examples/rf/../wireframes/open-library-dom.html [capture] Wrote config: /Users/kconroy/repos/docs-wireframe-demo/examples/rf/../wireframes/open-library-dom.json [capture] Wrote standalone: /Users/kconroy/repos/docs-wireframe-demo/examples/rf/../wireframes/open-library-dom-standalone.html [capture] Done. 3 step(s) captured.
kw.doc: Write wireframe HTML and JSON demo config to *out_dir*.

suite.doc:
Captures the Open Library search demo in both screenshot and DOM modes. Used to produce the side-by-side comparison embedded in the Robot Framework Capture documentation page (docs/wireframe/rf-capture.rst).
Run: conda run -n wireframe-demo guidestar-capture examples/rf/open-library-dom.robot --out examples/wireframes --standalone
conda run -n wireframe-demo guidestar-capture examples/rf/open-library-dom.robot --out examples/wireframes --standalone
